ddls:
CREATE TABLE "geological_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the data was collected */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the geological formation */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the geological formation */,
  "uncertainty" INTEGER /* Uncertainty in measurement */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the site */,
  "thickness" INTEGER /* Thickness of the geological formation */,
  "collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection method used */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geological_data_elevation FOREIGN KEY ("elevation") REFERENCES elevations ("elevation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geological_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geological_data_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geological_data_uncertainty FOREIGN KEY ("uncertainty") REFERENCES uncertainties ("uncertainty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geological_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geological_data_thickness FOREIGN KEY ("thickness") REFERENCES thicknesses ("thickness_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site (e.g., West Branch, Iowa, United States) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site (e.g., terrestrial, marine, geological) */,
  "site_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of category (e.g., sedimentary, igneous, metamorphic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of method (e.g., drilling, seismic survey, coring) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uncertainties" (
  "uncertainty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level of uncertainty */,
  "uncertainty_level" INTEGER /* Level of uncertainty in measurement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the level of uncertainty */,
  "uncertainty_type" TEXT /* Type of uncertainty (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uncertainty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elevations" (
  "elevation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each elevation */,
  "elevation_value" INTEGER /* Elevation value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the elevation */,
  "elevation_unit" TEXT /* Unit of elevation (e.g., meters, feet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("elevation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thicknesses" (
  "thickness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thickness */,
  "thickness_value" INTEGER /* Thickness value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the thickness */,
  "thickness_unit" TEXT /* Unit of thickness (e.g., meters, feet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thickness_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., raw data, processed data) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES geological_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata_files" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the metadata file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the metadata file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the metadata file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., dataset description, data collection method) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES geological_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_institution FOREIGN KEY ("institution") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of access (e.g., IP address, geographic location) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES geological_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES geological_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset collected */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection method used */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the collection event */,
  "collector_name" TEXT /* Name of the person collecting the data */,
  "collection_location" TEXT /* Location where the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_logs_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES geological_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset analyzed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Findings from the analysis */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  "results_file" TEXT /* File containing the results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_results_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES geological_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_results_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)
